title: How can God "command" testimonies / testimony?  What actions are required of a person who has been commanded testimony? How do you guard/observe/keep testimony?
body:
Deuteronomy 6:17
HB2 6:17 שָׁמוֹר תִּשְׁמְרוּן אֶת־מִצְות יְהוָה אֱלֹהֵיכֶם וְעֵדֹתָיו וְחֻקָּיו אֲשֶׁר צִוָּךְ:
YLT ye do diligently keep the commands of Jehovah your God, and His testimonies, and His statutes which He hath commanded thee,
LEB You shall diligently keep the commandments of Yahweh your God and his legal provisions and his rules that he has commanded you.
labels: teach me how to use the Bible
tags: teach me how to use the Bible
